jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Hopscotch - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Hopscotch:
Hopscotch is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch!
